inputs.label: Length (ft)
inputs.businessContext: The length of the area to be covered with mulch, measured in feet.

businessContext_i18n.en: The length of the area to be covered with mulch, measured in feet.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malçla kaplanacak alanın fit cinsinden uzunluğu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Länge der mit Mulch zu bedeckenden Fläche, gemessen in Fuß.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La longueur de la zone à couvrir de paillis, mesurée en pieds.
businessContext_i18n.es: La longitud del área a cubrir con mantillo, medida en pies.
businessContext_i18n.ar: طول المنطقة المراد تغطيتها بالمهاد، مقاسًا بالقدم

inputs.label: Width (ft)
inputs.businessContext: The width of the area to be covered with mulch, measured in feet.

businessContext_i18n.en: The width of the area to be covered with mulch, measured in feet.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malçla kaplanacak alanın fit cinsinden genişliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Breite der mit Mulch zu bedeckenden Fläche, gemessen in Fuß.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La largeur de la zone à couvrir de paillis, mesurée en pieds.
businessContext_i18n.es: El ancho del área a cubrir con mantillo, medido en pies.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عرض المنطقة المراد تغطيتها بالمهاد، مقاسًا بالقدم

inputs.label: Mulch Depth (in)
inputs.businessContext: The desired depth of mulch layer, measured in inches.

businessContext_i18n.en: The desired depth of mulch layer, measured in inches.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İstenen malç tabakası derinliği, inç cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die gewünschte Tiefe der Mulchschicht, gemessen in Zoll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La profondeur souhaitée de la couche de paillis, mesurée en pouces.
businessContext_i18n.es: La profundidad deseada de la capa de mantillo, medida en pulgadas.
businessContext_i18n.ar: العمق المطلوب لطبقة المهاد، مقاسًا بالبوصة

inputs.label: Bag Volume (ft³)
inputs.businessContext: The volume of a single bag of mulch, typically 2 cubic feet.

businessContext_i18n.en: The volume of a single bag of mulch, typically 2 cubic feet.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir malç torbasının hacmi, tipik olarak 2 fit küp.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das Volumen eines einzelnen Mulchsacks, typischerweise 2 Kubikfuß.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le volume d'un seul sac de paillis, généralement 2 pieds cubes.
businessContext_i18n.es: El volumen de una sola bolsa de mantillo, típicamente 2 pies cúbicos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: حجم كيس واحد من المهاد، عادة 2 قدم مكعب.
